I got the idea for him based loosely off of a comic on TikTok by possumtracks. I love Fiadh and Njotr.

I hope you check it out.

The Ufalkkar are supposed to be like vikings, so I made him speak Icelandic bc I said so.

Anyway. Short intro. I'm sorry. I don't have the energy after this week from hell, but I wanted to post something so that you all knew I was alive.

We had 100+mph winds pull trees out of the ground all over my city and where I live was without electricity for 4 days. Thats fixed, but now I'm sick with the 'vid. (Yay, small kids who bring germs home from preschool)

I didn't test him.

runs away to sleep for another 48 hours.
